{"type":"freeform","cover":{"titleText":"","titleTextRelFontSize":10,"subTitleText":"","subTitleTextRelFontSize":6,"presenterText":"","presenterTextRelFontSize":4,"dateText":"","dateTextRelFontSize":3,"logos":[]},"section":{"sectionText":"","sectionTextRelFontSize":8,"smallerSectionText":"","smallerSectionTextRelFontSize":5},"freeform":{"content":[[{"type":"text","markdown":"# This report analyzes data quality and service use using data from Nigeria's District Health Management Information System (DHIS-2) from January 2025 through October 2025 and comparing with 2024.","stretch":true,"fillArea":false,"textSize":1,"textBackground":"none","placeholderInvisible":false,"placeholderStretch":true,"placeholderHeight":50,"useFigureAdditionalScale":false,"figureAdditionalScale":1,"imgHeight":300,"imgFit":"inside","imgStretch":true,"hideFigureCaption":false,"hideFigureSubCaption":false,"hideFigureFootnote":false}],[{"type":"text","markdown":"# Data Quality Assessment 

The data quality assessment looks at three measures of data quality:

- The presence of extremely high values (outliers)
- Whether ANC1 is greater than ANC4 and Penta 1 is greater than Penta 3 (internal consistency)
- Whether expected indicator values were reported (indicator completeness)
- An average across these three criteria for selected RMNCAH indicators is then used to calculate a data quality summary score","stretch":true,"fillArea":false,"textSize":1,"textBackground":"grey","placeholderInvisible":false,"placeholderStretch":true,"placeholderHeight":50,"useFigureAdditionalScale":false,"figureAdditionalScale":1,"imgHeight":300,"imgFit":"inside","imgStretch":true,"hideFigureCaption":false,"hideFigureSubCaption":false,"hideFigureFootnote":false},{"type":"text","markdown":"# Service Utilization 

All services utilization analyses use quality-adjusted data from the DHIS-2:

- Total number of services reported
- Comparing the number of services reported to in 2025 to 2024 and identifying if services utilization has increased or decreased than expected. 
- Estimating 2025 service coverage for key indicators since the last NDHS 2024 using quality-adjusted HMIS data and the best available denominator.","stretch":true,"fillArea":false,"textSize":1,"textBackground":"grey","placeholderInvisible":false,"placeholderStretch":true,"placeholderHeight":50,"useFigureAdditionalScale":false,"figureAdditionalScale":1,"imgHeight":300,"imgFit":"inside","imgStretch":true,"hideFigureCaption":false,"hideFigureSubCaption":false,"hideFigureFootnote":false}]],"useHeader":true,"headerText":"Methodology ","useFooter":true,"footerText":"For full documentation of all methods including source code, please visit: https://github.com/FASTR-Analytics/docs/tree/main/methodology"}}
